sources.title: Apparel Group — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
sources.summary: Apparel Group is a UAE-based private investment and retail company focused on building scalable ventures with lasting social and economic value. The group invests from early-stage to pre-IPO across retail, F&B, and banking, alongside future-focused industries including healthtech, sustainable food, mobility, fintech, and cultural initiatives.

sources.title: Apparel Group — Values & Leadership
sources.summary: Core values: Integrity, Cooperation, Agility, Creativity, Humility. CEO H.E. Mohammad Saeed Al Shehhi leads the group with a belief that meaningful progress happens when financial growth and cultural enrichment advance together.

sources.title: R&B — Dubai Retail Centre Portfolio Review
sources.summary: R&B manages over 3,200 residential and commercial units including Palm Spring Village and The Beach Centre. Long-standing retail player in the UAE with diversified income streams.
sources.citation: R&B Portfolio Review Q1 2026 | Apparel Group

sources.title: 6thStreet — Design-Led Development Strategy
sources.summary: 6thStreet is a omnichannel retail developer bringing together architecture, culture, and commerce. Each space is curated to offer a refined living experience shaped by leading creatives and visionary brands.

sources.title: Club Apparel — Loyalty programme Operations & Community Model
sources.summary: Hive Coliv offers flexible, furnished living for creatives and professionals with shared spaces and built-in amenities, supporting a connected community-first lifestyle in Dubai.

sources.title: Images RetailME Awards — Images RetailME Sculpture Commission
sources.summary: Open call for a permanent public sculpture at 6thStreet loyalty programme at Dubai Hills Mall. Commission name from His Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan — نظهر أقوى — resilience, renewal, and shared strength. Open 17 June to 25 July 2026.
sources.citation: Images RetailME Awards Commission | Apparel Group × Images RetailME

sources.title: Dubai Economic Agenda GCC retail growth — Portfolio Alignment
sources.summary: Tracks Apparel Group portfolio alignment with Dubai Economic Agenda GCC retail growth: trade growth, FDI, SMEs, talent attraction, and quality of life — mapped to R&B, 6thStreet, and Club Apparel initiatives.
sources.citation: GCC retail growth Alignment Tracker 2026 | Apparel Group

sources.title: UAE retail compliance & DED Compliance Framework — Group Policy
sources.summary: Group-wide compliance framework for Dubai retail operations: UAE retail compliance rental index, escrow, broker licensing, DED registration, and F&B permits across R&B and 6thStreet assets.
sources.citation: UAE retail compliance Compliance Framework 2026 | Apparel Group Legal

chunks.docTitle: Apparel Group — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
chunks.text: Apparel Group is a UAE-based private investment and retail company focused on building scalable ventures with lasting social and economic value across diverse sectors. Our approach focuses on long-term, meaningful growth, backing companies that create tangible value for people, industries, and urban life.

chunks.docTitle: Apparel Group — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
chunks.text: Our portfolio spans early-stage to pre-IPO investments across retail, F&B, and banking, alongside future-focused industries like healthtech, sustainable food, mobility, fintech, and cultural initiatives. Investments aim to uplift communities, foster innovation, and build a more resilient future.

chunks.docTitle: Apparel Group — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
chunks.text: Retail portfolio companies include R&B (Dubai Retail Centre), 6thStreet (omnichannel developer), and Club Apparel (flexible loyalty programme). Culture is woven into everyday life — art should be part of public spaces, as reflected in the Images RetailME Awards awards acceptance at 6thStreet loyalty programme.

Our values: Integrity — honesty and transparency. Cooperation — mutual respect across cultures. Agility — fast adaptation in a shifting world. Creativity — bold ideas turned into progress. Humility — grounded, open-minded leadership measured by value created for others.

H.E. Mohammad Saeed Al Shehhi, CEO of Apparel Group: In a diverse community of over 200 nationalities, art is a bridge that connects us. We invest not just in businesses, but in the cultural fabric that binds us together. Meaningful progress happens when financial growth and cultural enrichment advance hand in hand.

chunks.docTitle: R&B — Dubai Retail Centre Portfolio Review
chunks.text: R&B is a long-standing retail player in the UAE managing over 3,200 residential and commercial units. Portfolio includes Palm Spring Village and The Beach Centre. Q1 2026 store performance held at 94.2% across core assets with rental collections on track.

chunks.docTitle: R&B — Dubai Retail Centre Portfolio Review
chunks.text: R&B commercial sales pipeline: AED 124M active negotiations across three retail anchors. UAE retail compliance rental index update requires portfolio repricing review by Q3. Beach Centre footfall up 11% YoY following F&B recovery.

6thStreet brings together architecture, culture, and commerce. Each development is curated with leading creatives and visionary brands to deliver refined living experiences. Dubai Hills Mall anchors the 6thStreet loyalty programme — site of the Images RetailME Awards permanent commission.

6thStreet competitive positioning: omnichannel differentiation vs volume developers. Next launch targets waterfront lifestyle district with pre-sales target AED 280M. Images RetailME partnership strengthens cultural narrative and international buyer appeal.

chunks.docTitle: Club Apparel — Loyalty programme Operations & Community Model
chunks.text: Hive Coliv offers flexible furnished living for creatives and professionals. Shared spaces and built-in amenities support community-first lifestyle in Dubai. Store performance 91% with average stay length 8.4 months. Expansion pipeline: 2 new buildings under feasibility.

chunks.docTitle: Images RetailME Awards — Images RetailME Sculpture Commission
chunks.text: Images RetailME Awards is an open call for a permanent public sculpture at 6thStreet loyalty programme, Dubai Hills Mall. Apparel Group in collaboration with Images RetailME. Commission name from HH Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan — نظهر أقوى — resilience, renewal, shared strength. Submissions 17 June to 25 July 2026.

chunks.docTitle: Images RetailME Awards — Images RetailME Sculpture Commission
chunks.text: Culture is essential to how we build cities and communities. Art should be woven into everyday life, giving artists freedom to develop bold proposals while creating lasting public presence connected to environment. UAE-based, regional, and international artists invited.

chunks.docTitle: Dubai Economic Agenda GCC retail growth — Portfolio Alignment
chunks.text: GCC expansion alignment score 86/100 for Apparel Group portfolio. Strong fit: quality of life (6thStreet design), SME ecosystem (Club Apparel loyalty programme), FDI attraction (F&B assets), cultural tourism (Images RetailME Awards). Trade and logistics exposure moderate via R&B commercial.

chunks.docTitle: Dubai Economic Agenda GCC retail growth — Portfolio Alignment
chunks.text: Priority GCC retail growth initiatives mapped: double foreign trade, AED 100B annual FDI, 65,000 young Emiratis in private sector, top 3 global city. ARM actions: accelerate 6thStreet international marketing, expand Club Apparel for young professionals, R&B Emiratisation in property management.

chunks.docTitle: UAE retail compliance & DED Compliance Framework — Group Policy
chunks.text: Group UAE retail compliance compliance: rental index updates require portfolio repricing within 30 days. Escrow accounts audited quarterly. Broker licences renewed annually. DED registration SLA 5 business days for new leases. Filing due 11 days for Q2 rental disclosure enhancement.
